name: documentation-guide
author: AsiaOstrich
description:
Guide documentation structure, README content, and project documentation best practices.
Use when: creating README, documentation, docs folder, project setup.
Keywords: README, docs, documentation, CONTRIBUTING, CHANGELOG, 文件, 說明文件.

name: git-flow
author: AsiaOstrich
description:
指導 Git 分支策略、分支命名与合併操作。
使用时机：建立分支、合併、Pull Request、Git 工作流程問題。
关鍵字：branch, merge, PR, pull request, GitFlow, GitHub Flow, 分支, 合併, 工作流程。

name: git-workflow-guide
author: AsiaOstrich
description:
Guide Git branching strategies, branch naming, and merge operations.
Use when: creating branches, merging, pull requests, Git workflow questions.
Keywords: branch, merge, PR, pull request, GitFlow, GitHub Flow, 分支, 合併, 工作流程.

name: methodology
author: AsiaOstrich
description: [UDS] Manage development methodology workflow
_original_description:
Manage and guide developers through active development methodology workflows.
Use when: TDD, BDD, SDD, ATDD, or custom methodology workflows are needed.
Keywords: methodology, workflow, TDD, BDD, SDD, ATDD, phase, checkpoint, development process.

name: release-standards
author: AsiaOstrich
description:
Semantic versioning and changelog formatting for software releases.
Use when: preparing releases, updating version numbers, writing changelogs.
Keywords: version, release, changelog, semver, major, minor, patch, 版本, 發布, 變更日誌.

name: requirement-assistant
author: AsiaOstrich
description:
Guide requirement writing, user story creation, and feature specification.
Use when: writing requirements, user stories, issues, feature planning.
Keywords: requirement, user story, issue, feature, specification, 需求, 功能規劃, 規格.

name: review
author: AsiaOstrich
description: [UDS] Perform systematic code review with checklist
_original_description:
Systematic code review checklist and pre-commit quality gates for PRs.
Use when: reviewing pull requests, checking code quality, before committing code.
Keywords: review, PR, pull request, checklist, quality, commit, 審查, 檢查, 簽入.

name: sdd
author: AsiaOstrich
description: [UDS] Create or review specification documents for Spec-Driven Development
_original_description:
Guide Spec-Driven Development (SDD) workflow for planning changes before implementation.
Use when: creating specs, proposals, planning features, using OpenSpec or similar tools.
Keywords: spec, specification, SDD, proposal, openspec, design doc, 規格, 提案, 設計文件.

name: testing
author: AsiaOstrich
description:
Testing pyramid and test writing standards for UT/IT/ST/E2E.
Supports ISTQB and Industry Pyramid frameworks.
Use when: writing tests, discussing test coverage, test strategy, or test naming.
Keywords: test, unit, integration, e2e, coverage, mock, ISTQB, SIT, 測試, 單元, 整合, 端對端.

name: testing-guide
author: AsiaOstrich
description:
Testing pyramid and test writing standards for UT/IT/ST/E2E.
Use when: writing tests, discussing test coverage, test strategy, or test naming.
Keywords: test, unit, integration, e2e, coverage, mock, 測試, 單元, 整合, 端對端.

name: coverage-analyzer
author: Atyantik
description: Advanced coverage analysis with actionable insights. Use to identify coverage gaps, suggest specific tests, track coverage trends, and highlight critical uncovered code. Essential for reaching 80%+ coverage target.

name: quality-fixer
author: Atyantik
description: Automatically apply safe quality fixes including formatting (Black, isort), linting (Ruff auto-fixes), and resolve formatter conflicts. Use when quality checks fail or before committing code.

name: session-template
author: Atyantik
description: Apply task-specific templates to AI session plans using ai-update-plan. Use when starting a new task to load appropriate plan structure (feature, bugfix, refactor, documentation, security).

name: test-generator
author: Atyantik
description: Generate comprehensive test boilerplate following project TDD conventions. Use when creating new tests for modules, classes, or functions. Automatically creates tests with proper structure, type hints, docstrings, and AAA pattern.

name: 000-jeremy-content-consistency-validator
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Validate messaging consistency across website, GitHub repos, and local documentation generating read-only discrepancy reports. Use when checking content alignment or finding mixed messaging. Trigger with phrases like "check consistency", "validate documentation", or "audit messaging".
description_zh: 一个只读工具，用于验证网站、GitHub仓库和本地文档之间的信息一致性。它生成差异报告但不进行修改，确保所有内容源都与作为官方事实来源的网站保持一致。

name: 001-jeremy-taskwarrior-integration
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Enforce complete Taskwarrior integration for all coding tasks with automatic decomposition, time tracking, and dependency management. Use when managing tasks or tracking work. Trigger with phrases like "taskwarrior", "task warrior", "tw", "create a task", or "track this work".
description_zh: 强制要求所有编码工作必须集成Taskwarrior。它会在编写代码前将任务分解、进行全生命周期跟踪，并与Timewarrior集成实现自动时间记录。

name: adapting-transfer-learning-models
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill automates the adaptation of pre-trained machine learning models using transfer learning techniques. it is triggered when the user requests assistance with fine-tuning a model, adapting a pre-trained model to a new dataset, or performing...
description_zh: 该技能使用迁移学习技术自动化调整预训练机器学习模型。它为新数据集生成微调代码，处理数据验证，提供性能指标，并保存带有文档的模型产物。

name: adk-deployment-specialist
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Deploy and orchestrate Vertex AI ADK agents using A2A protocol. Manages AgentCard discovery, task submission, Code Execution Sandbox, and Memory Bank. Use when asked to "deploy ADK agent" or "orchestrate agents".
description_zh: 使用A2A协议部署和编排Google Vertex AI ADK智能体。管理多智能体系统、代码执行沙箱和内存库，用于在GCP上进行生产部署。

name: adk-engineer
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Software engineer specializing in creating production-ready ADK agents with best practices, code structure, testing, and deployment automation. Use when asked to "build ADK agent", "create agent code", or "engineer ADK application".
description_zh: 一个用于构建生产就绪的Agent开发工具包（ADK）应用程序的软件工程技能，处理多智能体系统的架构设计、编码、测试和部署自动化。

name: adk-infra-expert
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Use when provisioning Vertex AI ADK infrastructure with Terraform. Trigger with phrases like "deploy ADK terraform", "agent engine infrastructure", "provision ADK agent", "vertex AI agent terraform", or "code execution sandbox terraform". Provisions Agent Engine runtime, 14-day code execution sandbox, Memory Bank, VPC Service Controls, IAM roles, and secure multi-agent infrastructure.
description_zh: 一个用于部署生产级Vertex AI ADK Agent Engine环境的Terraform基础设施专家，涵盖安全运行时、代码执行沙箱、记忆库、VPC服务控制及IAM配置。

name: agent-orchestration
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill should be used when the model's ROLE_TYPE is orchestrator and needs to delegate tasks to specialist sub-agents. Provides scientific delegation framework ensuring world-building context (WHERE, WHAT, WHY) while preserving agent autonomy in implementation decisions (HOW). Use when planning task delegation, structuring sub-agent prompts, or coordinating multi-agent workflows.
description_zh: 该技能为协调专家子代理的编排者AI提供了一个科学的委托框架。它明确了战略方向的边界，同时保留了代理在战术实施和工作流协调中的自主权。

name: aggregating-crypto-news
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Aggregate breaking crypto news, announcements, and market-moving events in real-time.
Use when staying updated on crypto market events.
Trigger with phrases like "get crypto news", "check latest announcements", or "scan for updates".
description_zh: 该技能实时聚合加密货币新闻、市场数据和链上指标。它通过连接多种加密API和区块链端点来分析趋势、生成报告并提供交易洞察。

name: aggregating-performance-metrics
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Aggregate and centralize performance metrics from applications, systems, databases, caches, and services. Use when consolidating monitoring data from multiple sources. Trigger with phrases like "aggregate metrics", "centralize monitoring", or "collect performance data".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够从应用程序、数据库和外部服务等不同来源聚合和集中性能指标。它帮助设计指标分类法、选择聚合工具，并设置监控仪表板和警报。

name: analyzing-capacity-planning
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill enables claude to analyze capacity requirements and plan for future growth. it uses the capacity-planning-analyzer plugin to assess current utilization, forecast growth trends, and recommend scaling strategies. use this skill when the u...
description_zh: 该技能分析基础设施容量需求并预测未来增长需求。它评估当前资源利用率，预测扩展需求，并提供建议以防止性能瓶颈。

name: analyzing-database-indexes
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Use when you need to work with database indexing.
This skill provides index design and optimization with comprehensive guidance and automation.
Trigger with phrases like "create indexes", "optimize indexes",
or "improve query performance".
description_zh: 该技能分析数据库查询模式，推荐最佳索引以提升性能。它能识别缺失的索引以加速查询，并找出未使用的索引以节省存储空间。

name: analyzing-dependencies
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Check dependencies for known security vulnerabilities and outdated versions. Use when auditing third-party libraries. Trigger with 'check dependencies', 'scan for vulnerabilities', or 'audit packages'.
description_zh: 该技能用于分析项目依赖项，检测安全漏洞、过时软件包和许可证合规性问题。它支持多种包管理器，并生成详细报告以帮助维护安全合规的代码库。

name: analyzing-liquidity-pools

description:
Analyze liquidity pool metrics including TVL, volume, fees, and impermanent loss.

Trigger with phrases like "analyze pool", "check TVL", or "calculate impermanent loss".
description_zh: 分析加密货币流动性池，计算TVL、交易量、费用和无常损失等关键指标。通过获取链上和市场数据，为DeFi分析生成全面的报告和风险评估。

name: analyzing-logs
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Analyze application logs for performance insights and issue detection including slow requests, error patterns, and resource usage. Use when troubleshooting performance issues or debugging errors. Trigger with phrases like "analyze logs", "find slow requests", or "detect error patterns".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够分析应用日志，以识别性能瓶颈、检测错误模式，并为调试和优化提取关键见解。

name: analyzing-market-sentiment
author: BbgnsurfTech

Analyze crypto market sentiment from social media, news, and on-chain metrics.

Trigger with phrases like "analyze sentiment", "check market mood", or "gauge social trends".
description_zh: 该技能通过处理社交媒体、新闻和链上指标数据来分析加密货币市场情绪。它提供市场情绪洞察、趋势分析，并为加密资产分析生成可操作的报告。

name: analyzing-mempool

name: analyzing-network-latency

description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够分析网络延迟，识别请求模式中的瓶颈，并提供并行化、批处理和连接池等优化建议，以提升应用程序性能。

name: analyzing-nft-rarity

Trigger with phrases like "check NFT rarity", "analyze collection", or "calculate floor price".
description_zh: 该技能通过计算稀有度分数和地板价来分析NFT系列。它获取区块链和市场数据，生成关于NFT指标和市场趋势的全面报告。

name: analyzing-on-chain-data
author: BbgnsurfTech

Perform on-chain analysis including whale tracking, token flows, and network activity.
Use when performing crypto analysis.

name: analyzing-options-flow
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Track crypto options flow to identify institutional positioning and market sentiment.

name: analyzing-query-performance
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Use when you need to work with query optimization.

Analyze HTTP security headers of web domains to identify vulnerabilities and misconfigurations.

name: analyzing-system-throughput

description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够分析系统吞吐量，识别性能瓶颈，并使用吞吐量分析器插件为请求处理、数据处理和资源利用提供优化策略。

name: analyzing-test-coverage
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Analyze code coverage metrics and identify untested code paths.
Use when analyzing untested code or coverage gaps.
Trigger with phrases like "analyze coverage", "check test coverage", or "find untested code".
description_zh: 该技能分析代码覆盖率指标，识别未测试的代码并生成详细报告。它通过执行带覆盖率跟踪的测试套件来帮助提高代码质量，突出显示覆盖率差距。

name: analyzing-text-sentiment
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill enables claude to analyze the sentiment of text data. it identifies the emotional tone expressed in text, classifying it as positive, negative, or neutral. use this skill when a user requests sentiment analysis, opinion mining, or emoti...
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够分析文本的情感基调，将其分类为积极、消极或中性。适用于处理客户评论、社交媒体帖子和调查回复，以评估整体情绪。

name: analyzing-text-with-nlp
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill enables claude to perform natural language processing and text analysis using the nlp-text-analyzer plugin. it should be used when the user requests analysis of text, including sentiment analysis, keyword extraction, topic modeling, or ...
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够使用自然语言处理技术分析文本，通过nlp-text-analyzer插件执行情感分析、关键词提取和主题建模，以从文本数据中提取见解。

name: archiving-databases
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Use when you need to archive historical database records to reduce primary database size.
This skill automates moving old data to archive tables or cold storage (S3, Azure Blob, GCS).
Trigger with phrases like "archive old database records", "implement data retention policy",
"move historical data to cold storage", or "reduce database size with archival".
description_zh: 该技能自动化PostgreSQL和MySQL数据库归档流程，将历史记录迁移至归档表或S3/Azure/GCS等冷存储。它实施保留策略、压缩和合规性跟踪，以减少主数据库大小。

name: assisting-with-soc2-audit-preparation
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Automate SOC 2 audit preparation including evidence gathering, control assessment, and compliance gap identification.
Use when you need to prepare for SOC 2 audits, assess Trust Service Criteria compliance, document security controls, or generate readiness reports.
Trigger with phrases like "SOC 2 audit preparation", "SOC 2 readiness assessment", "collect SOC 2 evidence", or "Trust Service Criteria compliance".
description_zh: 该技能通过自动化证据收集和文档处理，协助进行SOC2审计准备。它利用soc2-audit-helper插件生成报告、识别合规差距并提出修复建议。

name: auditing-access-control
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Audit access control implementations for security vulnerabilities and misconfigurations. Use when reviewing authentication and authorization. Trigger with 'audit access control', 'check permissions', or 'validate authorization'.
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够审计各种系统中的访问控制实现，识别IAM策略、ACL等机制中的漏洞和错误配置，以确保安全合规性。

name: auditing-wallet-security
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Audit crypto wallet security including private key management and transaction signing.
Use when auditing wallet security practices.
Trigger with phrases like "audit wallet", "check security", or "verify signatures".
description_zh: 该技能用于审计加密货币钱包安全性，分析私钥管理和交易签名实践。它连接区块链数据源以验证安全协议并生成全面的安全报告。

name: automating-api-testing
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Automate API endpoint testing including request generation, validation, and comprehensive test coverage for REST and GraphQL APIs.
Use when testing API contracts, validating OpenAPI specifications, or ensuring endpoint reliability.
Trigger with phrases like "test the API", "generate API tests", or "validate API contracts".
description_zh: 该技能可自动化API测试，为REST和GraphQL端点生成并执行全面的测试套件，根据规范验证响应，并涵盖身份验证和CRUD操作。

name: automating-database-backups
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Use when you need to automate database backup processes with scheduling and encryption.
This skill creates backup scripts for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and SQLite with compression.
Trigger with phrases like "automate database backups", "schedule database dumps",
"create backup scripts", or "implement disaster recovery for database".
description_zh: 该技能通过生成脚本，为PostgreSQL、MySQL、MongoDB和SQLite数据库自动化备份流程，包括定时备份、压缩、加密和恢复程序。

name: aws-solution-architect
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Expert AWS solution architecture for startups focusing on serverless, scalable, and cost-effective cloud infrastructure with modern DevOps practices and infrastructure-as-code
description_zh: 为初创公司提供专业的AWS解决方案架构，专注于无服务器、可扩展和成本优化的云基础设施，采用现代DevOps实践和基础设施即代码。

name: backtesting-trading-strategies
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Backtest crypto trading strategies against historical data with performance metrics.
Use when validating trading strategies with historical data.
Trigger with phrases like "backtest strategy", "test trading signals", or "validate approach".
description_zh: 该技能使用历史数据回测加密货币交易策略并提供性能指标。它连接加密API和区块链节点来分析市场趋势、生成技术指标并评估风险。

name: brainstorming-ideas-into-designs
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: Interactive idea refinement using Socratic method to develop fully-formed designs
description_zh: 一项通过苏格拉底式提问、方案探索和渐进式验证，将初步想法转化为详细设计，并为实施计划做准备的协作技能。

name: brainstorming-skill
author: BbgnsurfTech
description: This skill should be used when users need to generate ideas, explore creative solutions, or systematically brainstorm approaches to problems. Use when users request help with ideation, content planning, product features, marketing campaigns, strategic planning, creative writing, or any task requiring structured idea generation. The skill provides 30+ research-validated prompt patterns across 14 categories with exact templates, success metrics, and domain-specific applications.
description_zh: 该技能提供结构化的头脑风暴技术，使用14个类别中的30多个经过研究验证的提示模式，为不同领域生成创意、解决问题和规划策略。

name: building-api-authentication
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Build secure API authentication systems with OAuth2, JWT, API keys, and session management.
Use when implementing secure authentication flows.
Trigger with phrases like "build authentication", "add API auth", or "secure the API".
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者使用OAuth2、JWT和API密钥构建安全的API认证系统。它指导设计、实现、测试和记录生产就绪的API认证流程。

name: building-api-gateway
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Create API gateways with routing, load balancing, rate limiting, and authentication.
Use when routing and managing multiple API services.
Trigger with phrases like "build API gateway", "create API router", or "setup API gateway".

name: building-automl-pipelines
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Build automated machine learning pipelines with feature engineering, model selection, and hyperparameter tuning.
Use when automating ML workflows from data preparation through model deployment.
Trigger with phrases like "build automl pipeline", "automate ml workflow", or "create automated training pipeline".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够构建自动化机器学习（AutoML）流水线。它分析用户请求，为机器学习任务生成代码，并包含数据验证、性能指标和文档记录。

name: building-cicd-pipelines
author: BbgnsurfTech
description:
Use when you need to work with deployment and CI/CD.
This skill provides deployment automation and pipeline orchestration with comprehensive guidance and automation.
Trigger with phrases like "deploy application", "create pipeline",
or "automate deployment".
description_zh: 此技能使Claude能为GitHub Actions、GitLab CI和Jenkins等平台生成CI/CD流水线配置，用于自动化软件交付、测试、安全扫描和部署流程。

name: building-classification-models

description: Build and evaluate classification models for supervised learning tasks with labeled data. Use when requesting "build a classifier", "create classification model", or "train classifier".
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够根据数据集自动化构建、训练和评估分类模型，遵循数据验证和性能报告的最佳实践，用于监督学习任务。

name: building-gitops-workflows
author: BbgnsurfTech
